text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rrrrring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My alarm goes off, signaling the start of a new
day.
choice_data_list:
Time for another great day of training with my
trainee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting everything ready, I set off for the
training track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen is holding scrimmages today, and the
track is full of Umamusume running around to
warm up before the races.
choice_data_list:
Everyone's working so hard to fulfill their
dreams...

Everyone's working so hard to fulfill their
dreams...

text_block_list.text: I couldn't have put it better myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
This is truly a treasure trove of talent!
Umamusume worth treating, as far as the eye can
see! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Now who shall I start with?
choice_data_list: Tazunaaa! This lady's acting suspicious!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what?! Hold up! I'm an ally to all
Umamusume! I swear, my sharp needles can boost
their powers to fearsome—
choice_data_list: I knew you were dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on, I'm not dangerous at all! Why, as a
result of my intensive training, I've even massively
improved the speed I can roll up hand towels!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hrnnngh... All right, how about this—let me give
you a demonstration! I'll show you just how safe
my treatment is and blow all your worries away!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'll even control my urge to poke people
until you give me your seal of approval, okay?
Please?!
choice_data_list: Fine! Show me your worst!
I suppose I can see how things go...
I think I'll pass!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! ♪ Now with that out of the way, let's bring
you closer to being an Umamusume! ☆
choice_data_list: Closer to being... an Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What're you staring at me all dumbfounded
for?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
My acupuncture is for Umamusume, so I need
testimonials from subjects as close to the target
demographic as I can get.
choice_data_list: But isn't that like... asking for the impossible?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! To become like an Umamusume, all
you have to do is train like one! Probably! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Let's get going, Trainer... Or rather,
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If it's speed you want, an exercise bike is
everything you need! Go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Faster, faster! Let me see you up that cadence!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Next on the list is backstroke! Swim until all your
limbs go numb! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Yup, yup! That's it—keep up the good form! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Finally, we gotta work on your abs to increase
your overall strength! One, two, three, four! Don't
you worry anymore!
choice_data_list: (M-my body feels like it's about to give out...)

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Why? Because you're not training
alone!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Believe in the power of your friendship... with me!
choice_data_list: F-friendship?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what she's saying, but it's certainly
reassuring to know I'm not alone in this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is just like the training I did before with
<chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow, wow, wow! What a great success, if I do say
so myself! ☆ Now that's what I call friendship
training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good job! ☆ Looks like your training has paid
dividends! ♪
choice_data_list: Um... So why are we at the infirmary?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh c'mon, don't play dumb! We're finally able to
get to the main event now!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now that you're done with training... let me give
you a little poke! ♪
choice_data_list: I-I'm not mentally prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Relax, relaaax! It'll be quick and painless, so don't
you worry! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Strangely enough, my body feels much lighter!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that expression on your face... You're
kidding... It actually worked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: I did it! I knew I was a genius! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep this up and perform even more
successful treatments! You do your best in
becoming an Umamusume too, 'kay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well?! Didn't that needle pin you right where you
needed it? Do you feel it working its magic deep
down?!
choice_data_list: I feel pins and needles, all right... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! No way—are you telling me it worked too well?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, there's always next time! Shrug it
off! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You might be unable to move for a while, but get
well soon! Anyway, see you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I can't do anything but lie there, I use the
time to go over the training plan I have in mind
for <chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! ♪ Now with that out of the way, let's bring
you closer to being an Umamusume! ☆
choice_data_list: Closer to being... an Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What're you staring at me all dumbfounded
for?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
My acupuncture is for Umamusume, so I need
testimonials from subjects as close to the target
demographic as I can get.
choice_data_list: But isn't that like... asking for the impossible?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! To become like an Umamusume, all
you have to do is train like one! Probably! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, as you yourself suggested, let's try it out
and see how things work out. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Let's get going, Trainer... Or rather,
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Let's start off with a turf sprint!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Not bad! Your speed is impressive! ♪ Though I'd
still easily outpace you if I hightailed it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Next on the menu is breaststroke! Build up that
stamina now and it'll be smooth sailing for you in
the future! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Your swimming style reminds me of the way I
looked while frantically searching for a needle I
dropped into a pond.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Finally, we can't forget about training your
strength! ♪ And that'll come naturally by running
on dirt! Probably!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll be here waiti—ack! When did all this dirt get in
my heels?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done! ☆ Looks like you worked up a great
sweat! ♪
choice_data_list: Um... So why are we at the infirmary?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh c'mon, don't play dumb! We're finally able to
get to the main event now!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now that you're done with training... let me give
you a little poke! ♪
choice_data_list: I-I'm not mentally prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Relax, relaaax! It'll be quick and painless, so don't
you worry! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow... I feel as though I'm brimming with
power! However...
choice_data_list: I... I can't feel my fingertips...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that's a worrying side effect! Maybe this is a
sign that I still have much to improve...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
This might have been the fault of my
acupuncture, but it might have also been because
I went too easy on your training!
choice_data_list: I thought I got a good workout, though.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! We'll have to step up your training a
couple notches for you to become more like an
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If the training you did today was, say, level one...
I get the feeling we'll need you to go all the way
up to level three!
choice_data_list: I-I'll do what I can...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ For my sake... No, for the future of
acupuncture and Umamusume, you must work
hard to become an Umamusume yourself!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You can do it,
<username>! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? I didn't quite catch what you said! Could
you repeat that?
choice_data_list:
I said I'll pass. You're asking way too much of
me!

I said I'll pass. You're asking way too much of
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without waiting for a reaction, I quickly turn and
leave, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, practice partner! Where do
you think you're going?!
choice_data_list: She's chasing after me?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: You can't shake me off that easily! They don't call me Ol' Stubborn Sasami for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No worrieeees!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Resistance is futile!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Surrender your body to me, the legendary
acupuncturist Sasami Anshinzawa! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!
choice_data_list: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Well? Do you feel tremendous power
coursing through your veins?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, what? What's the matter?!
choice_data_list: Why's... everything spinning?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I should get
going! Bye! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today I've learned the hard way to never go
along with sketchy deals... I vow to teach my
trainee the same lesson during our next session.
